title: MIDAS2 protocol example input dataset v1
author: Chunyu Zhao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Example input dataset for MIDAS2 protocols.  

 Include single-end sequencing reads for two HMP mock community samples: SRR172902 and SRR172903.
